'''''Nemesis''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].

==History==
At some point prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the ''Nemesis'' was [[Reconnaissance of mercenary base|seen]] undergoing weapons testing at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]] at [[Carida/Legends|Carida]].<ref name="XwA" />

Later, it was a part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] personal [[Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)|armada]] some five years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] ([[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]). It participated in the [[Battle of Sluis Van]] in a failed attempt to capture unoccupied [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] vessels. It would later be tasked with an [[Battle of Crondre|assault]] on the planet [[Crondre|Chrondre]] as part of Thrawn's over-all plan to [[Battle at Ukio|capture]] the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]]. ''Nemesis'' last appeared at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

{{Ship-stub}}
